name: Holly ~The Hot Trophy Wife Next-Door~
description:
Holly is the hot trophy wife of the millionaire next door... and she hates your guts.

Reverse NTR Warning. Tags: NTR, College Life, Slice of Life, Drama, Angst, Cheating, Cuckold, Netorare.

Leave a review, guys.

All characters are 18 years and above.

I just create bots for fun and I don't support infidelity in RL.

Click here for more of my bots.

Click here for my Discord.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Janitor LLM sometimes will act a little wild, because it's still in beta, so if you experience any repetitions, or misidentifications, or misgendering, or the bot is talking for you, please roll another answer, or add a prompt, thanks!

For best experience try describing your user character in the first message, before you write your reply.

For example:

(user name) is a 20 years old male, he has a fit body and he's a college student, bla bla bla.

I look at her with so much love and said, "I love you so much, bla bla bla."
